# Serving Our Customers at Every Stage

Sift’s Professional Services support and propel your business forward with expert assistance, ranging from dedicated Customer Success Managers to comprehensive Managed Services.

[Managed Services Overview](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Sift-Managed-Services-one-pager.pdf)

![Services](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Services.png)

## Triangulated Tuning to Surface True Risk

Sift’s Custom, Global, and ThreatClusters models collectively improve detection accuracy by up to 20%. Custom models are tailored to individual customers’ unique fraud patterns, Global models capture broader fraud trends, and ThreatClusters provide industry-specific insights derived from related cohorts. Optimize model performance, reduce score shifts, and ensure consistent performance with our AI-powered platform and expert support.

1

MODEL TRAINING

**Model Training** gives fraud teams the support and confidence they need to manage and scale fraud operations efficiently and effectively.

Our Standard Package, PLUS:

-   Monthly Model Labeling
-   Monthly Model Feedback
-   Monthly Model Training

2

PREMIUM

**Managed Services** ensure ongoing optimization of fraud strategies with expert audits and recommendations—at any size or scale.

Our Standard Package, PLUS:

-   Quarterly Workflow Auditing
-   Monthly Model Labeling, Tuning, Feedback & Training
-   Biannual Account Optimization Through a Deep-Dive Analysis of Anomalous Behavior
-   Biannual Strategic Business Review

3

PREMIER

**An advanced Managed Services** offering that does the work of a full-time fraud team, including hands-on automation, model training, labeling, and tuning.

Our Standard Package, PLUS:

-   Quarterly Account Optimization
-   Quarterly Strategic Business Review
-   Annual Integration Review
-   Monthly Workflow Auditing
-   Weekly Model Tuning, Labeling, Feedback & Training
